channel.title: planning for dialogue AI on Sukai Huang
channel.description: Recent content in planning for dialogue AI on Sukai Huang

item.title: Christian Muise Planning for Goal Oriented Dialgue Systems 2019
item.description: [TOC] Title: Christian Muise Planning for Goal Oriented Dialgue Systems 2019 Author: Publish Year: Review Date: Tue, Jan 30, 2024 url: arXiv:1910.08137v1 Summary of paper Motivation there is increasing demand for dialogue agents capable of handling specific tasks and interactions in a business context Contribution the author propose a new approach that eliminates the need for manual specification of dialogue trees, a common practice in existing systems.
